name: GIGABYTE Z790 AORUS ELITE AX ICE ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-7600(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.0 - DisplayPort 1.2 - 2.5 GbE LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6E (Z790 A ELITE AX ICE)
shortName: GIGABYTE Z790 AORUS ELITE AX ICE ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: ATX Z790 motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 with PCIe 5.0 and Wi-Fi 6E support.
